_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: 前端质量门：flutter analyze / flutter test 必须全绿，覆盖 enabled/disabled 切换
Widget 测试规范：验证 count=20 时按钮 onPressed=null + Tooltip 出现 + ReorderableRow 仍可用
跨层一致性：UI 的 isSessionFull 判断与 provider 的 _isSessionFull / _appendCapped 上限逻辑共享 kMaxImportSessionImages，不能分叉硬编码
复用性检查：isSessionFull 应在 provider 暴露作为 selector，而非在两个 widget 各自硬编码 imageCount >= 20
